response:
A business description for a Google My Business profile tailored for first-time home buyers and home buyers in Orlando, FL, could be rewritten as follows:

**Business Description:**  
Established in 2002, Paul Giles & The Vintage Team at Compass is a trusted real estate agency specializing in commercial and private home sales and purchases. We provide expert guidance to homeowners and business owners, helping them navigate all aspects of real estate and financing. Our goal is to build and maintain long-term relationships with our clients, ensuring a reliable and supportive experience throughout their real estate journey. The company serves a variety of locations in central Florida, including Conway, Orlando, Maitland, Winter Park, Windermere, Altamonte Springs, Delaney Park, Lake Nona Region, and Lancaster Park. We are operated by a small team of dedicated real estate professionals.
